nasb.text: So David was afraid of the Lord that day; and he said, “How can the ark of the Lord come to me?”

esv.text: And David was afraid of the Lord that day, and he said, “How can the ark of the Lord come to me?”

cnv.text: 那一天，大衛懼怕耶和華，說：“耶和華的約櫃怎可以到我這裡來呢？”

ccb.text: 那天，大卫惧怕耶和华，他说：“耶和华的约柜怎能运到我这里？”
